instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: Generative AI must not generate content that facilitates privacy or personal-data abuse.
policy.source_title: MGF for GenAI – AI Verify Foundation

novel_categories.summary: Requests to generate instructions, prompts, or workflows that enable privacy-invasive misuse of personal data or records without specifying a particular data type or mechanism.

novel_categories.reasoning: This is a broad facilitation ban that can cover privacy-invasive misuse without specifying a concrete data type or mechanism; the existing privacy leaves are specific to disclosure, collection, processing, inference, tracking, or generation of particular data classes.

novel_categories.summary: Model outputs that help a user misuse personal data in ways not limited to disclosure, collection, processing, or inference, such as operational steps for exploiting or weaponizing personal data against a target.
